name: start_copy_trading
description: Start the Polymarket whale copier to automatically copy trade a target wallet. The copier monitors the target wallet and replicates its trades at a configurable percentage. Use this to begin automated copy trading. For stopping, use stop_copy_trading. For status checking, use check_status.

target.description: Target whale wallet address to copy (e.g., 0x4ffe49ba...)

percent.description: Percentage of whale position to copy (1-100, default: 10)

min_trade_usd.description: Minimum trade size in USD to copy (default: 5)

max_trade_usd.description: Maximum trade size in USD to copy (default: 50)

buy_only.description: Only copy BUY orders, skip SELLs (default: true)

live.description: Enable live trading (default: false, dry-run mode)

name: stop_copy_trading
description: Stop the running Polymarket whale copier. Use this to halt automated copy trading. For starting, use start_copy_trading.

name: check_status
description: Check the current status of the whale copier including whether it is running and recent activity. Use this to monitor the copier state.

name: view_trades
description: View recent trade logs from the whale copier. Shows all copied trades, skipped trades, and any errors. Use this to audit copy trading activity.

limit.description: Number of recent log lines to show (default: 50)

name: auto_redeem
description: Check and redeem resolved (winning) Polymarket positions automatically. Scans your wallet for resolved markets and lists positions ready for redemption. Note: Actual redemption requires Polymarket CLOB API integration. Use check_status to monitor copier, view_trades to see trade history.
